categories.title: Categories & Rules
categories.description: Manage your categories and auto-categorization rules in one place.
categories.loadingError: Failed to load categories or rules. Please refresh.
categories.refreshHint: Saved, but the dashboard may need a manual refresh.
categories.globalDesc: Shared defaults available to all users.
categories.applyRulesDescription: Auto-categorize processes uncategorized transactions only. Recategorize re-applies every rule (highest priority first) to all non-manually-edited transactions in the selected range, overwriting prior auto-categorizations.
categories.autoCategorizeNone: No uncategorized transactions matched any rule.
categories.recategorizeNone: No transactions changed in the selected range.

errors.invalidDateRange: Start date must not be after end date.
errors.recategorizeFailed: Failed to recategorize the selected range.
